target: 1. Hiding Embarrassment
July 22nd
Ushio…?
Shinpee!?

(Clenching his fists…
Hey, are you angry?!)
I-I'm sorry… sorry, Ushio…!
…uh…uh…
(Ushio…)
I'm sorry…

I went to Tokyo on my own…
And showed up like that…
I'm sorry too…
I didn't go to see you off…
N-why am I crying like this…?
I-I didn't mean for it to be like this!

It's because of a dream I had recently!
A dream where I'd never see you again, Shinpei.
Huh.

It's sad, but also happy.
It was a weird dream…
(…Same thing.)
(I think I had the same dream too.)
Ushio, that dream…
What are you two staring at?

You were even holding hands
and hugging each other.
It's like a drama scene.

D-did we hug…?
Did I really do that!?

It's obvious.
Hey, big sister?

It might just look like that…
but…

N-no, it's not like that.
I got too excited and tripped…
And I just ran into Shinpei in front of me!
…So that's what happened?
I was going to hit you once.

Plus, I couldn't believe you suddenly hugged me!
I wanted to hit you two or three more times!

B-but… 
I'm glad you came back honestly.
I'll forgive you this time.

What are you saying?
You're probably happy to have seen Shin-chan, right?

Mio, what are you saying?
Don't say weird things.

If you weren't happy, 
why did you hug Shin-chan?

I just tripped and ran into him!
I already said that!

Plus, when Shinpei put his hands on my back…
You ended up misunderstanding it, Mio!

W-what!?
S-so, it was you who…?

Ah, you're not being honest at all…
You should just admit it.
"Unexpectedly hugged you."
I said it's not like that…!
Hey, big sister.
U-uh…

Ah~… why do I feel hungry all of a sudden?
I'll go ahead!
--Hey, wait!
Hah, you're not being honest at all…
Then, let's go back too.
Yeah…
…Huhu.

W-what's with you, Mio?
You suddenly started smiling…

Shin-chan, your eyes are a bit red.
You two were crying, right?

A-ah, actually…
But why was I crying?
I don't even know myself.

That's because you were so happy, right?
You didn't even realize it yourself.

(The words Mio said earlier…
It felt like it finally made sense)

(That's right… 
I guess I was really happy after all)

(I heard your voice on the phone.
I knew I'd be able to meet today)

(But when I saw Ushio's face…
I felt extremely relieved from the bottom of my heart)
(It was so real, I almost cried)
But… I'm really glad…
Huh? What?
That's why…
What… what was it?

(What is this feeling?
It's like I should remember, but I can't)

(But I'm certain…
I'm definitely relieved)
Hey Shin-chan, you're spacing out.

I'm going now, big sister.
Hurry up and catch up.

I-I don't need to chase after her…
I know where she's going…

Ugh, Shin-chan's not being honest either.
You're not in a situation to be shy.
I-I'm not shy!
Either way, if you don't hurry, I'll leave you behind.
Ah, wait!
